implements LayoutManager

      • GridLayout

        public GridLayout(int rows,
          int cols)
        Constructs a new GridLayout with the given number of rows and columns
        Parameters:
        rows - the number of rows the GridLayout should have
        cols - the number of cols the GridLayout should have
